reviews.review_msg: I took SA356W with Michelle this summer. It was the best class I have taken in my whole time at SFU. The classes were long but nicely broken up by group quizzes, activities, lectures, films and breaks. She was passionate about teaching and I actually enjoyed coming to class! 10/10 recommend a class with her!

Dr. Shaw is amazing! You can just tell that she is so passionate about her work and Sociology and Anthropology in general. She really cares about each students' success and makes sure all assignment outlines are fully equipped with full expectations. On top of that, Dr. Shaw is hilarious and makes coming to class not feel like a chore :-)

Stern, was quite unprofessional with her mannerisms in the classroom. Avoid if you can.

I think Pam is one of those Prof's that you either really vibe with or do not like. Overall, I think she is a fair marker and is passionate about what she teaches. I thought the assignments were fair and interesting. Sometimes class discussions were a bit dry but overall I enjoyed the class and would take one of her classes again!

great teacher,very helpful, nice and kind, and what can i say, a great teacher. Better than C.A. I would recommend anyone to take her class. Class discussion and maybe easy marker. TAKE HER!!! TRUST ME lol.

Parin is a wonderful professor. She shows genuine insight and is dedicated to make the material mean something to you. If you do the readings, show up, talk in class and can write decent you will get an A.. She is always available for help as well. I would recommend taking a class with her.
